title: HoldSprint
description: Ever got weirded cause minecraft sprinting just turns on when clicking the sprint button? This project makes you hold the sprint button to sprint.
body:
# HoldSprint
HoldSprint replaces Minecraft’s default sprint toggle with a smooth, responsive hold-to-sprint system.

## Why does this mod exist?
I created this mod because I prefer a more controlled sprinting style. Instead of relying on Minecraft’s toggle mechanic, I like holding a key (such as Shift) to precisely control when I sprint and when I stop. HoldSprint makes that behavior simple, consistent, and intuitive.

## What's the keybind for hold-sprint?
The keybind will always be the same as your sprint keybind.
